title: Tokens, Source Spans, Document Trees, Invariants, and Traversal · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs tokens, source spans, document trees, invariants, and traversal from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for typed source-mapped document tree after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.
Model document, block, inline, text, code, link, image, and error nodes with explicit payload and children invariants.
Retain source path, line, column, byte or code-point span, and original excerpt through transformations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance. Artifact under review: typed source-mapped document tree.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Visitor Transform, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Visitor Transform record says typed source-mapped document tree looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Visitor Transform.

For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof. This does not satisfy Visitor Transform for typed source-mapped document tree.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Visitor Transform: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 4470 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; test empty, malformed, deeply nested, Unicode, collision, unsafe URL, missing asset, stale cache, rejected, and recovery cases; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform.
steps.why: Retrieving Visitor Transform through the concrete typed source-mapped document tree case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform, keep Visitor Transform connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Visitor Transform precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review publishing team handles case 4470 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; test empty, malformed, deeply nested, Unicode, collision, unsafe URL, missing asset, stale cache, rejected, and recovery cases; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Visitor Transform, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: A visitor may change child lists while iterating without observable risk.
